name: obsidian-vault-bridges
description: Link external Git repositories into your Obsidian vault via managed symlinks.

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.posttest:screenshots:update: cp test/screenshots/snapshots/ui.spec.ts-snapshots/settings-bridges-chromium-darwin.png docs/screenshot-settings.png && cp test/screenshots/snapshots/ui.spec.ts-snapshots/settings-empty-chromium-darwin.png docs/screenshot-empty.png && cp test/screenshots/snapshots/ui.spec.ts-snapshots/add-bridge-modal-chromium-darwin.png docs/screenshot-add-bridge.png && cp test/screenshots/snapshots/ui.spec.ts-snapshots/error-state-chromium-darwin.png docs/screenshot-error.png
